question.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.

variants.text: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.

hints.hint:
After negative/restrictive adverbials (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom, Only then…), **subject-auxiliary inversion** is required.
The inverted auxiliary must match the tense of the original clause. Only the auxiliary comes before the subject.

Po przysłówkach o znaczeniu ograniczającym (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom…) wymagana jest inwersja podmiotu i operatora.
Inwertowany operator musi odpowiadać czasowi zdania. Tylko operator przechodzi przed podmiot.

«Rarely» викликає інверсію; у Present Perfect: «Rarely has + підмет + Past Participle».
«Such a talented composer» — підмет в однині; Present Perfect для однини вимагає «has».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «had» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «had» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворило б Past Perfect; «Rarely» тут вводить Present Perfect про загальний факт.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворило б Past Perfect; «Rarely» тут вводить Present Perfect про загальний факт.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. «has» is the right form here based on the grammar rule for this sentence type.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «has» jest właściwą formą zgodnie z regułą gramatyczną tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Has» — правильна інверсія Present Perfect після «Rarely»; «Rarely has such a composer been...»

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Has» — правильна інверсія Present Perfect після «Rarely»; «Rarely has such a composer been...»

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «have» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «have» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Have» вживається для множини або I/you/they; підмет «a composer» — однина.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Rarely {a1} such a talented composer been so underappreciated.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Have» вживається для множини або I/you/they; підмет «a composer» — однина.
